/usr/lib64/ccache/bin/gcc  -D_LANGUAGE_C  -O0 -g -D_DEBUG   CMakeFiles/gensyn.dir/src/action0.c.o CMakeFiles/gensyn.dir/src/anasynt0.c.o CMakeFiles/gensyn.dir/src/avl.c.o CMakeFiles/gensyn.dir/src/format.c.o CMakeFiles/gensyn.dir/src/gensyn_option.c.o CMakeFiles/gensyn.dir/src/groups.c.o CMakeFiles/gensyn.dir/src/table.c.o CMakeFiles/gensyn.dir/src/analex0.c.o CMakeFiles/gensyn.dir/src/arbsem.c.o CMakeFiles/gensyn.dir/src/encinfo.c.o CMakeFiles/gensyn.dir/src/gensyn_error.c.o CMakeFiles/gensyn.dir/src/gensyn_version.c.o CMakeFiles/gensyn.dir/src/lname.c.o  -o ../../../../../bin/gensyn -rdynamic ../../../../../lib/librtkutils.a
